HGSS.145.0000:
Cynthia: My name is Cynthia.
I am a Pokémon Trainer.\f
The [FF00,0001]Sinjoh Ruins[FF00,0000] remind me of Sinnoh,
where I come from.\f
Initially, I thought it was because
it snows a lot here as well.\f
But that was not it.\f
A long time ago...people came from
Sinnoh to live here.\f
They must have built a temple here
while longing for home.\f
That’s why we call these the
[FF00,0001]Sinjoh Ruins[FF00,0000]...\f
HGSS.145.0001:
Cynthia: You are...\r
a Pokémon Trainer?\f
I can sense strong power coming
from your Poké Ball...\f
HGSS.145.0002:
Cynthia: I wouldn’t assume you managed
to get here by yourself.\f
This is a heavy-snowfall area where
the snowbound land freezes you\r
to the core...\f
Talk to the old man if you wish to go
back. ABRA should be able to take you\r
where you come from.
HGSS.145.0003:
Cynthia: I feel a familiar presence...
The power of DIALGA...\r
PALKIA...\r
or could it be GIRATINA?\f
It’s similar, but not quite the same...\f
HGSS.145.0004:
Cynthia: Have you got time?\f
Can you come to the [FF00,0001]Sinjoh Ruins[FF00,0000]
with me?\f
Call it a Trainer’s intuition.\f
When you and your Pokémon step onto
that stage, something will happen.\f
HGSS.145.0006:
Cynthia: The snowbound ruins make
me wonder...\f
Time and space change, and we with
them. We leave some things behind\r
and give each other company...\f
Sinnoh, Johto...
When you feel you’re close to\r
understanding the whole world,\r
you are merely drowning in your\r
own miniscule perception.\f
HGSS.145.0007:
A long time ago, people used to draw
life from Pokémon and also give their\r
lives to those Pokémon...\f
That shows that people and Pokémon
used to be more closely bonded with\r
each other.\f
When people moved from place to place,
the myths and legends of Pokémon\r
and their power would also be carried\r
with those people.\f
That’s how myths and legends from each
region are blended with each other.\f
The ancient ruins here have inherited
the legends from both the [FF00,0001]Ruins of Alph[FF00,0000]\r
in Johto and the [FF00,0001]Spear Pillar[FF00,0000] in Sinnoh.\f
That is proof that people from Johto
and Sinnoh blended together\r
as a group.
HGSS.145.0008:
ARCEUS is said to have come out of
an Egg.\f
Johto people believe that Pokémon Eggs
are the vessels of life, and thus\r
something astounding.\f
Places far from each other can share
similar myths and legends...\f
That’s quite interesting, isn’t it?
HGSS.145.0009:
Well, hello!
We meet again!\f
Cynthia has gone back to Sinnoh.\r
She is the Sinnoh League Champion.\f
She studies various ruins despite her
tight schedule.\f
How wonderful she is!
HGSS.145.0010:
You seem so out of place, not even
knowing why you are here.\f
Do you want my ABRA to use a
special power to take you home? [0200,0000]
HGSS.145.0011:
OK. OK.
Picture your house in your mind...\f
HGSS.145.0012:
OK... OK...
The best of luck to you!
